description.unified: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, pulls them in front of you, then deals Physical Damage to enemies within range and stuns them for 3 sec.
For 7 sec, your Physical Block Chance is increased by [(added) 200], and when you block, you deal Physical Damage to nearby enemies and reduce their Attack by [20%->25%].

For [(added) 8 sec], all allies’ Physical Damage taken is reduced by [(added) 20%], and you prepare to leap for [(added) 5 sec]. While preparing to leap, when you block, the leap attack’s damage is increased by 7%, you deal Physical Damage to the attacker, and stun them for [(added) 0.4 sec]. When casting is complete, you leap to the enemy, dealing Physical Damage and stunning them for [4 sec->2.5 sec]. While preparing to leap, you are immune to status ailments.
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense and Physical Block Chance by 250.

IV.unified: Increases the duration of stun by [2 sec->1.2 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but pulls in 2 enemies.

dark.unified: Reduces the Physical Defense of pulled enemies by 30% for 5 sec.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

dark.unified: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by [20%->24%] for [10 sec->7 sec].
Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but cooldown is reduced by 6 sec.

light.unified: Physical Defense increase is boosted by [20%->30%], and Physical Block Chance is increased by [50%->75].

dark.unified: Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by [(added) 250].

description.unified: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by [(added) 100] and raises the target’s P.DMG taken by {0}% for [10 sec->5 sec].
[Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by [(added) 50%] and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec.
[Spearhead] recovers 40% of P.DEF every sec when blocking, and increases P.DEF gained by {0}% for 5 sec. P.DEF Boost can stack up to 5 times.

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by [20%->25%] for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by {0}%. On block, has a {1}% chance to restore {2} [(removed) %] Mana to yourself and reduce the cooldown of all skills by 1 sec.
